description_long: This is a tall, roughly hewn stone obelisk with an irregular, naturalistic shape, standing vertically on a rectangular stone base. The front face features an engraved inscription in Czech, with some text highlighted in bold, while the rear face displays a mounted plaque with additional text. The stone surface is coarse and uneven, with visible chisel marks and natural fractures, giving it a rugged appearance. The base is a flat, rectangular slab, slightly wider than the obelisk itself, and rests on a paved or gravel platform. The color of the stone is predominantly gray with subtle variations and some moss or weathering visible on the upper surfaces. The overall impression is of a commemorative monument, likely marking a historical or significant urban location.
description: A rugged, gray stone obelisk with engraved inscriptions and a mounted plaque, set on a rectangular stone base.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main engraved inscription on the rough stone surface, with the irregular top and the rectangular base clearly visible.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the obelisk's narrow profile and the natural, jagged edges of the stone, with the base extending slightly beyond the obelisk.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a mounted plaque with Czech text, highlighting the rough stone texture and the solid, rectangular base.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the uneven, natural stone surface and the thickness of both the obelisk and its base.
attribute_inscription: There are two visible inscriptions: one engraved directly into the front face of the stone in Czech, with some text in bold, and another on a metal plaque mounted on the rear face. Both are in a sans-serif font, legible, and in the Czech language.
attribute_base_design: The base is a flat, rectangular stone slab, slightly larger than the obelisk, with a rough, unfinished edge and no decorative features. It sits atop a paved or gravel platform.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is irregular and jagged, following the natural fracture of the stone, with no additional finishing or decoration.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is set on a paved or gravel platform, with some moss or grass visible at the edges. No other notable surrounding features are present.
